title: Fluent Agents Studio
big_statement: The complete user guide — from zero to hero

title: What the studio makes

both}.c2{animation-delay:.15s}.c3{animation-delay:.3s}.c4{animation-delay:.45s}@keyframes f{from{opacity:0}to{opacity:1}}</style><text x="40" y="90" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="34" text-anchor="middle">yourself</text></g></svg>

title: The core idea
big_statement: You describe. The studio produces. You never edit by hand.

title: Your first look
bullets: Dark page, split in two
Left: library of all your work
Search box always on top
Amber New Generation starts projects
Right: workspace opens on the form

title: The form: from source to sound
bullets: Box one is Source
Paste a URL, or upload a PDF
Or drag a PDF onto the box

title: The three decisions that matter
bullets: Mode: Podcast, Summary, or Readout
Run Until: Script Draft (cheap start) or Full
Audience: describe who's listening
Personality & voices are optional

title: Slides and captions
bullets: Slides: web, video, PowerPoint, or mix
Captions: Burned in, or Toggle on/off
Animations: content glides in piece by piece
Then press Start Generation

title: The four stations
figure_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 1000 620" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><style>.ln{stroke-dasharray:760;stroke-dashoffset:0;animation:draw 1.6s ease both}@keyframes draw{from{stroke-dashoffset:760}to{stroke-dashoffset:0}}.d{opacity:1;animation:pop .5s ease both}.d2{animation-delay:.4s}.d3{animation-delay:.8s}.d4{animation-delay:1.2s}@keyframes pop{from{opacity:0}to{opacity:1}}</style><text x="500" y="110" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="34" fill="#f2f0eb" text-anchor="middle">One assembly line, four stations</text><line class="ln" x1="110" y1="300" x2="890" y2="300" stroke="#9aa0ab" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.5"/><g class="d"><circle cx="140" cy="300" r="22" fill="#e8a13c"/><text x="140" y="370" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="26" fill="#f2f0eb" text-anchor="middle">Script</text><text x="140" y="405" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="22" fill="#9aa0ab" text-anchor="middle">words written</text></g><g class="d d2"><circle cx="380" cy="300" r="22" fill="#e8a13c"/><text x="380" y="370" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="26" fill="#f2f0eb" text-anchor="middle">Slides</text><text x="380" y="405" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="22" fill="#9aa0ab" text-anchor="middle">visuals designed</text></g><g class="d d3"><circle cx="620" cy="300" r="22" fill="#e8a13c"/><text x="620" y="370" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="26" fill="#f2f0eb" text-anchor="middle">Voice</text><text x="620" y="405" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="22" fill="#9aa0ab" text-anchor="middle">voice recorded</text></g><g class="d d4"><circle cx="860" cy="300" r="22" fill="#e8a13c"/><text x="860" y="370" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="26" fill="#f2f0eb" text-anchor="middle">Outputs</text><text x="860" y="405" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="22" fill="#9aa0ab" text-anchor="middle">packaged</text></g><text x="500" y="500" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="24" fill="#9aa0ab" text-anchor="middle">Change any station — everything after it updates</text></svg>

title: Station 1 — the script
bullets: Every line the voice will speak
Revise in plain words at the bottom
Only the lines you name change
Polish while words are cheap

title: Station 2 — the slides
bullets: A storyboard grid of cards
Real images pulled from your source
Charts and diagrams drawn from data
Asset Inventory maps every image

title: Templates: your brand identity
bullets: Upload a theme, style guide, or screenshot
Studio reads colors and fonts
Save once, reuse from a dropdown

title: Station 3 — the voice
bullets: Click a card's play symbol
Screen dims, one slide plays big
You hear only that slide's narration
Step through to catch timing slips

title: How you fix the voice
figure_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 1000 620" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><style>.n{opacity:1;animation:f .6s ease both}.n2{animation-delay:.3s}.n3{animation-delay:.6s}@keyframes f{from{opacity:0}to{opacity:1}}.ar{stroke-dasharray:300;stroke-dashoffset:0;animation:dr 1.4s ease both}@keyframes dr{from{stroke-dashoffset:300}to{stroke-dashoffset:0}}</style><text x="500" y="80" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="32" fill="#f2f0eb" text-anchor="middle">Review → Revise → Re-render</text><path class="ar" d="M 340 210 A 220 220 0 0 1 660 210" fill="none" stroke="#9aa0ab" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.6"/><path class="ar" d="M 690 250 A 220 220 0 0 1 560 490" fill="none" stroke="#9aa0ab" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.6"/><path class="ar" d="M 440 490 A 220 220 0 0 1 310 250" fill="none" stroke="#9aa0ab" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.6"/><g class="n"><circle cx="260" cy="210" r="85" fill="#1e222a" stroke="#e8a13c" stroke-width="2"/><text x="260" y="215" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="25" fill="#f2f0eb" text-anchor="middle">Review</text><text x="260" y="245" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="20" fill="#9aa0ab" text-anchor="middle">slide by slide</text></g><g class="n n2"><circle cx="740" cy="210" r="85" fill="#1e222a" stroke="#e8a13c" stroke-width="2"/><text x="740" y="205" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="25" fill="#f2f0eb" text-anchor="middle">Revise</text><text x="740" y="235" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="20" fill="#9aa0ab" text-anchor="middle">by line number</text></g><g class="n n3"><circle cx="500" cy="500" r="85" fill="#1e222a" stroke="#e8a13c" stroke-width="2"/><text x="500" y="495" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="25" fill="#f2f0eb" text-anchor="middle">Re-record</text><text x="500" y="525" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="20" fill="#9aa0ab" text-anchor="middle">in ~1–2 min</text></g></svg>

title: Station 4 — the outputs
bullets: Render Production packages everything
Audio, Transcript, Slideshow cards
Video preview and PowerPoint download
YouTube: publish private in one click

title: An honest note on cost
figure_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 1000 620" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><style>.big{opacity:1;animation:f 1s ease both}.sub{opacity:1;animation:f 1s ease .5s both}@keyframes f{from{opacity:0}to{opacity:1}}</style><text x="500" y="120" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="30" fill="#9aa0ab" text-anchor="middle">Typical model spend, full production</text><text class="big" x="500" y="320" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="150" fill="#e8a13c" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="bold">~40¢</text><text x="500" y="390" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="28" fill="#f2f0eb" text-anchor="middle">usually well under a dollar</text><text class="sub" x="500" y="490" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="26" fill="#9aa0ab" text-anchor="middle">Repeat revisions within minutes ≈ 1/10 price</text><text class="sub" x="500" y="530" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="26" fill="#9aa0ab" text-anchor="middle">So work in focused bursts</text></svg>

title: Your turn
big_statement: One pasted link — and you're a producer.
